JUDGE PRO TEM - CLAUDINE CHENG, REPORTER - SHERRY SAWYER ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEAL, MARY BOBO, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET #619, S.F., STAYED UNTIL AUG-19-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. RENT, DAMAGES & COSTS WVD UNLESS DFTS FAIL TO VACATE THEN DFTS TO PAY $1500- RENT + $16.67 PER DAY FROM 8/1/97 + $165- COSTS. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED.PLTF RETAINS SECURITY DEPOSIT. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION.
